agent.aria.fullContent: Allow full text for this run
agent.aria.fullContentEnabled: Full text allowed for this run
agent.empty: Ask a question, or use @ to reference clipboard history.
agent.fullContent.enabled: This run may use text/HTML body; files, images, and skills still send metadata only
agent.fullContent.summary: Summary only by default. Click to allow text/HTML body for this run
agent.permission.content.hint: Allow text/HTML body for this run; images and files still send metadata only
agent.permission.metadata.hint: Send only type, title, tags, source, and other metadata
agent.permission.summary.hint: Send summary and short preview; recommended default
agent.placeholder: Ask anything, or use @ to reference clipboard...
agent.run.streaming: Starting and waiting for streaming output...
main.status.agentEmptyResult: Agent result is empty; nothing saved
main.status.agentResultSaveFailed: Failed to save Agent result. See logs
main.status.agentResultSaved: Saved Agent result as a clipboard item
main.status.accessibilityGranted: Accessibility permission is active. Quick paste is ready
main.status.accessibilityMissing: Accessibility is not authorized; the panel will align to the right side of the mouse screen
main.status.accessibilityPrompted: Accessibility permission was requested. Restart ClipForge if it is enabled but still unavailable
main.status.clipboardCapturedShortcut: Recorded the new copy from the shortcut
main.status.clipboardPromoted: Current system clipboard moved to the top
main.status.clipboardSkipped: Clipboard type was filtered by capture settings
main.status.clipMissing: This clipboard reference no longer exists
main.status.loadMoreFailed: Failed to load more clipboard items. See logs
main.status.mcpInstallPromptCopied: MCP install prompt copied. Send it to the relevant Agent to connect.
main.status.panelFocusedTray: Panel focused. Search or use arrow keys to select
main.status.exportedTsv: Exported selected items as a TSV table
main.status.pastedCode: Pasted code to the current app
main.status.pasteCodeFallback: Paste failed. Code was copied to the clipboard
main.status.pasteFallback: Paste failed. Copied to the clipboard
main.status.openPathFailed: Resource path cannot be opened right now
main.status.pluginActionUnavailable: Plugin action is unavailable. Clipboard list is still usable
main.confirm.emptyTrash: Empty trash? This will permanently delete {count} records and cannot be undone.
main.error.command.CLIPBOARD_WRITE_FILE_: This file clipboard item has no paths to write back.
main.error.command.CLIPBOARD_WRITE_IMAGE: This image clipboard item is missing its local image file.
main.error.command.CLIPBOARD_READ_FAILED: Failed to read the system clipboard: {detail}
main.error.command.CLIPBOARD_EMPTY: The system clipboard is empty or unavailable.
main.error.command.CLIPBOARD_CAPTURE_SKI: This clipboard type is filtered by capture settings.
main.error.command.CLIP_NOT_FOUND: This clipboard item no longer exists.
main.error.command.CLIP_HARD_DELETE_FAIL: Failed to permanently delete clipboard item: {detail}
main.error.command.CLIP_DUPLICATE_CONTEN: A clipboard item with the same content already exists.
main.sample.title: ClipForge onboarding sample
main.sample.description: This starter item helps you practice the clipboard panel basics:
main.sample.shortcut.paste: - Enter or Cmd+number pastes the current item
main.sample.shortcut.delete: - Delete moves the current item to trash
main.sample.shortcut.detail: - Right-click opens detail; Ctrl/Cmd+J runs open-target or plugin quick actions
main.onboarding.quickOpen.title: Quick open
main.onboarding.quickOpen.body: Open the panel with the default shortcut, then search, select, and paste.
main.onboarding.sceneSelect.title: Scene 1: Keyboard selection
main.onboarding.sceneSelect.body: After opening the panel, use arrows to move and modifier number keys to paste visible items.
main.onboarding.scenePreview.title: Scene 2: Preview and drill in
main.onboarding.scenePreview.body: Use modifier arrow keys to page through long lists, then drill in when full detail is needed.
main.onboarding.sceneAi.title: Scene 3: AI intelligence
main.onboarding.sceneAi.body: The floating Agent panel can work with clipboard context; copy the MCP prompt for an external Agent to install.
main.onboarding.search.title: Search
main.onboarding.search.body: Start typing after the panel opens to filter clipboard history.
main.onboarding.selection.title: Select and page
main.onboarding.selection.body: Use arrow keys to move the active item; combine shortcuts to jump groups of 10.
main.onboarding.number.title: Number actions
main.onboarding.number.body: Use 0-9 for visible items; Space only selects the item.
main.onboarding.rowAction.title: Favorite and delete
main.onboarding.rowAction.body: Favorite or delete the active item; right-click opens detail, Ctrl+J runs quick actions.
main.onboarding.views.title: Switch lists
main.onboarding.views.body: Use the bottom buttons or Tab to switch history, favorites, and trash.
main.onboarding.agent.title: Agent mode
main.onboarding.agent.body: Open Agent mode when the current clipboard needs help; use @ in the composer to reference history without extra attach buttons.
main.onboarding.pin.title: Pin window
main.onboarding.pin.body: Pin the panel when it needs to stay open after focus changes.
main.errorBoundary.toast: The UI error was recorded. Clipboard services are still running.
main.errorBoundary.panelMessage: The error was logged. Switch lists or reopen the panel to recover.
main.errorBoundary.agentMessage: The error was logged. Clipboard list and detail views are unaffected.
main.detail.title: Detail
main.detail.missing: This content no longer exists. Return to the list and select again.
main.detail.previewFailedBody: Switched to raw text mode. The panel can continue running.
main.detail.htmlPreviewFallback: HTML content is too large or unavailable for preview. Raw text is shown.
main.detail.aiSummary.title: AI summary
main.detail.aiSummary.pendingBody: Checking model settings. Detail editing stays available while summary runs.
main.detail.aiSummary.empty: Generate a summary for this clip manually. ClipForge will not scan full history automatically.
main.detail.aiSummary.noProvider: No model provider is configured. Set one up in Settings first.
main.detail.aiSummary.unsupportedProvide: The current provider does not support summary generation yet.
main.detail.aiSummary.sdkPending: AI SDK dependencies and APIs still need confirmation, so no network call is made.
main.detail.aiRecommend.title: Related clips
main.detail.aiRecommend.empty: No related clips in the current context.
main.detail.sensitiveSummaryOnly: Sensitive fields detected. Agent only sees the summary by default.
main.detail.variablesVisibleThisSession: Current draft variables, visible only in this editing session.
main.aggregate.title: Multi-select aggregate
main.aggregate.subtitle: {count} items / {chars} chars
main.aggregate.rawHint: Concatenated in selection order and ready to copy.
main.aggregate.empty: Select multiple items to preview the aggregate result.
main.workspace.routeErrorMessage: Panel state is preserved. Return to the list to continue.
main.workspace.providerErrorMessage: Clipboard list data is still intact. Return to the list or retry.
main.pin.title: Pin panel ({shortcut})
main.multiSelect.title: Multi-select
main.empty.trashBody: Soft-deleted items appear here for restore or permanent deletion.
main.empty.noClipboardBody: Copy text and recent items will appear here.
main.context.copyPlainImageUnavailable: Plain text copy is unavailable for images in phase one
main.context.copyPathFileOnly: Only file items can be copied as paths
settings.language.title: Language
settings.navigation.label: Settings categories
settings.accessibility.title: macOS Accessibility permission
settings.accessibility.status.granted: Authorized: can align near the focused input
settings.accessibility.status.missing: Not authorized: using the right-side screen fallback
settings.accessibility.status.reset: ClipForge Accessibility authorization was reset. Enable this app again in System Settings.
settings.accessibility.description: Checked on launch to read the current focused input position.
settings.accessibility.noTccRecord: No TCC authorization record found for the current ClipForge app.
settings.onboarding.title: Onboarding
settings.onboarding.description: Complete the core clipboard-tool flow: permission, capture scope, and shortcut setup.
settings.onboarding.completed.descriptio: Onboarding is complete. You can still review each step here and adjust settings.
settings.onboarding.step.welcome.title: Welcome to ClipForge
settings.onboarding.step.welcome.descrip: Finish the minimum setup so clipboard history, search, and quick paste are ready.
settings.onboarding.step.accessibility.d: This permission lets the panel appear near the focused input. Without it, ClipForge uses a fallback position.
settings.onboarding.step.capture.title: Choose capture scope
settings.onboarding.step.capture.descrip: Decide which clipboard formats should enter history.
settings.onboarding.step.shortcut.title: Confirm the quick-open shortcut
settings.onboarding.step.shortcut.descri: Use the shortcut to open the standalone panel and copy recent content quickly.
settings.onboarding.step.tour.title: Feature overview
settings.onboarding.step.tour.descriptio: Review the core entry points, then start using ClipForge.
settings.onboarding.welcome.title: ClipForge starts with clipboard fundamentals
settings.onboarding.welcome.body: This onboarding only covers required setup: permission, capture scope, shortcut, and core feature locations.
settings.onboarding.accessibility.status: Authorized: can align near the focused input
Not authorized: using the fallback position
Permission was denied. Re-enable it in System Settings.
Permission detection is not supported on this platform
settings.onboarding.accessibility.fallba: Refresh to show the current permission result.
settings.onboarding.capture.note: Capture settings are saved immediately. Sensitive content stays off by default and enters history only after you enable it.
settings.onboarding.shortcut.note: This writes directly to settings. You can keep tuning it later in the Shortcuts section.
settings.onboarding.feature.search.title: Direct search
settings.onboarding.feature.search.body: Search results appear directly in the main list without a secondary panel.
settings.onboarding.feature.favorite.bod: Favorite reusable content and reach it quickly from the favorites view.
settings.onboarding.feature.trash.title: Trash
settings.onboarding.feature.trash.body: Deleted items go to trash first so accidental deletes can be recovered.
settings.onboarding.feature.agent.title: Agent
settings.onboarding.feature.agent.body: When content needs work, open Agent from the current clipboard item.
settings.update.status.latest: You are on the latest version.
settings.update.title: Update check
settings.integration.title: Floating trigger and MCP
settings.integration.floating.title: Floating panel trigger check
settings.integration.mcp.title: MCP Server
settings.integration.mcp.description: ClipForge hosts MCP automatically on startup. There is no stop action here, so test users do not accidentally turn off the resident service.
settings.integration.mcp.emptyTools: Refresh to show the current tool list
settings.integration.provider.title: Agent Provider JSON
settings.integration.provider.summary: {count} custom providers · CLI and OpenAI-compatible providers are configured separately
settings.integration.provider.descriptio: OpenAI-compatible gateways, OpenAPI-compatible gateways, and local CLIs are written to settings.json5. You can edit name, baseUrl, modelId, apiKeyEnv, or command directly.
settings.integration.examples.title: MCP and Agent examples
settings.integration.examples.summary: Install prompt, command, JSON-RPC, and provider template are grouped here.
settings.manual.title: User guide and MCP connection
settings.manual.agentSummary: Tools consistently use clipf.* names; legacy test aliases are not kept.
settings.manual.agentDescription: The app hosts MCP automatically on startup. External Agents / MCP Clients connect through the stdio command.
settings.manual.successContract: Successful responses always include ok, traceId, tool, source, businessChain, permissionDecision, nextActions, and result.
settings.manual.errorContract: Failures return JSON-RPC error.data with ok=false, traceId, hint, and expected so Agents can correct arguments automatically.
settings.manual.installPrompt.line1: Help me install the ClipForge MCP connection.
settings.manual.installPrompt.line2: Use stdio transport with this server command:
settings.manual.installPrompt.line3: After installation, prefer clipf.list / clipf.get / clipf.copy / clipf.search to read and operate on clipboard content.
settings.manual.installPromptCopied: {source} MCP install prompt copied. Send it to the relevant Agent to connect.
settings.agent.providerTemplateCopied: Agent provider JSON template copied. Paste it into the settings file and rename it as needed.
settings.content.link.title: Links
settings.content.link.body: Detect GitHub, GitLab, and regular links.
settings.content.command.title: Commands
settings.content.command.body: Detect commands such as pnpm, cargo, git, and curl.
settings.content.markdown.title: Markdown
settings.content.markdown.body: Preview in the detail panel while keeping original text copyable.
settings.content.code.title: Code
settings.content.code.body: Detect code snippets and keep monospace viewing.
settings.capture.title: Capture settings
settings.capture.multiType.title: Multi-format model
settings.capture.multiType.summary: Each record stores format, context, and extended JSON.
settings.capture.multiType.description: Fields are reserved for images, files, HTML/RTF, and AI-generated content. ClipForge no longer relies on the old text-only model.
settings.storage.data.title: Data storage
settings.logs.title: Logs
settings.diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
settings.diagnostics.confirmCleanup: Click again to clean current app logs
settings.tags.title: Tag rules
settings.tags.name: Tag name
window.main.title: ClipForge Clipboard
window.settings.title: ClipForge Settings
